title: Juggling Video Annotation Schema v1.0
description: Ground-truth annotation for a single juggling video clip. Objective metadata fields are filled from ffprobe/DB. Human-observation fields must be filled manually and must never be guessed or inferred automatically.

annotation_schema_version.description: Schema version — must be '1.0' for this schema. Appears exactly once per document.

video_id.description: Stable dataset identifier. Format: jug_b<batch>_<NNN> (e.g. jug_b1_001). Must match dataset_manifest.json.

filename.description: Original video filename (without path). Must match the file whose checksum_sha256 was computed.

upload_source.description: How the video was introduced to the system (upload mechanism, not capture device).

capture_device.description: Device used to record the video. 'unknown' when not determinable from metadata. Examples: 'iphone_15_pro', 'iphone_other', 'android', 'dji_mini', 'unknown'.

duration_seconds.description: Video duration in seconds from ffprobe format.duration.

original_resolution.description: Width x Height of the ORIGINAL uploaded video file as reported by ffprobe (before any processing or rotation correction).

processed_resolution.description: Width x Height of the processed/transcoded video file. Null if transcode was skipped or failed.

fps.description: Frame rate of the original video from ffprobe avg_frame_rate.

original_rotation_metadata.description: Rotation value in degrees from the original file's Display Matrix or rotate tag (0, 90, 180, 270). 0 means no rotation metadata present.

display_orientation.description: Visual orientation of the video as it should appear to a viewer, after applying original_rotation_metadata correction.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the ORIGINAL video file. Used to verify file integrity across environments.

privacy_review_status.description: Whether privacy review has been completed for this video.

ownership_confirmed.description: Has the uploader confirmed they own or have rights to this footage? Must be confirmed by a human before dataset inclusion.

consent_confirmed.description: Has consent been confirmed for all persons visible in the video? Must be confirmed by a human.

recognizable_third_party_present.description: Is there a recognizable third party (other than the uploader) visible in the video? Must be assessed by a human.

minor_present.description: Is a minor (under 18) visible in the video? Must be assessed by a human.

external_source.description: Was this video obtained from an external source (not self-recorded)? Must be confirmed by a human.

difficulty.description: Subjective difficulty tier. MUST be assessed by a human annotator based on visual inspection. Must never be inferred automatically.

total_juggling_count.description: Total juggling touches in the clip. MUST be counted manually at 0.5x playback speed. Must never be guessed or inferred automatically.

dominant_body_part.description: Body part responsible for the majority of touches. MUST be assessed by a human.

body_parts_used.description: Which body parts are used at least once. MUST be assessed by a human. Null until human review.

ball_visible_quality.description: Ball visibility quality. MUST be assessed by a human.

lighting_quality.description: Lighting quality. MUST be assessed by a human.

camera_stability.description: Camera stability. MUST be assessed by a human.

multi_person_present.description: Is more than one person visible? MUST be assessed by a human.

multiple_balls_present.description: Is more than one ball visible? MUST be assessed by a human.

expected_validity.description: Suitability for detection evaluation. MUST be assessed by a human.

invalidity_reason.description: If expected_validity is not 'valid', describe why. Null otherwise.

annotator.description: Initials of the primary annotator. Null until human review begins.

second_annotator.description: Initials of second annotator for cross-check. Null until cross-check is performed.

second_annotator_count.description: Count from second annotator. Null until cross-check.

inter_annotator_agreement.description: True if both annotators agree within ±2. Null until cross-check.

annotation_date.description: ISO 8601 date of annotation completion. Null until annotated.

contact_events.description: Frame-level contact events. Optional in v1.0 — required for Phase D training data. Null until Phase D preparation.
